entry.title: 🇮🇳 SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud
entry.content:
This SAP CodeJam event is about combining the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model with SAP HANA Cloud to create full-stack applications. In this CodeJam, we will learn how to deploy and configure an instance of the SAP HANA Cloud trial, develop a multi-target application using SAP Business Application Studio and the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model, and create a service layer and SAP Fiori UI that also includes SAP HANA native artifacts such as calculation views.

This is an in-person event only (not virtual) and is planned for Wednesday, 9th May, 2025 from 09:00 to 16:00 IST.

We thank Mindset Consulting for kindly hosting this event at Hyderabad. 

Event venue: 

Mindset Consulting,
WeWork Krishe Emerald,
Ground Floor,
Kondapur Main Road,
Lakshmi Cyber City, Whitefields,
Kondapur,
Hyderabad - 500081

The language of the event and the content will be English. 

The instructor is Developer Advocate @ajay_soreng 

There are essential pre-requisites that must be completed by every attendee before arriving at the event location. They are documented here:  https://github.com/SAP-samples/cap-hana-exercises-codejam/blob/main/prerequisites.md#normal-prerequi...

Please note that spaces are limited - we can only accommodate 25 attendees. Register here on this Community Event page by clicking the Yes button in the 'Will you be attending'? section.

For more information on SAP CodeJam events, to ask questions, and to chat with your fellow attendees, head over to the SAP CodeJam group.

SAP Cloud Application Programming Model  SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database

entry.title: Re: Big memory consumption XSLT, why Heap is used? Best with ST.
entry.content: Hi Sandra, like Ryan i think as well the intermediate format and the higher flexibility of XSLT have their price regarding memory and performance. Batch processes can't go priv, they typically use heap memory before they use EM (see report RSMEMORY for memory allocation sequence differences for DIA and BTC processes. Kind regards, Hermann

entry.title: Re: Configuring Embedded SAC in SAP Sales and SAP Service Cloud Version 2
entry.content:
@JG_LEE, the general concept of SSO is to remove the necessity of individual passwords / policies for the integrated systems and this is what SAP IAS allows you to do. While you still need to maintain the Business Roles and Access Restrictions in V2, you no longer need to handle authentication as this now is done centrally for all integrated systems in SAP IAS. This quote from the CIO guide explains it better than I would myself:

"To utilize new applications and features in SAP BTP, it is essential that the Identity Directory in SAP Cloud Identity Services includes all relevant users. Currently, almost all SAP applications and each SAP BTP subaccount maintain their own user stores. This legacy setup complicates remote management and compliance. The rapid development of cloud technologies has introduced various software stacks and methods of interacting with these user stores. SAP’s strategy aims to simplify this complexity through SAP Cloud Identity Services in the long term. The objective is to centralize user and group management within SAP Cloud Identity Services, enabling remote management of the entire SAP cloud landscape using APIs. New applications and SAP BTP features necessitate that users are present in the Identity Directory. To utilize these features, the Identity Directory must be populated with all relevant users, facilitating functions such as assigning policies through the Authorization Management service. While the initial setup of SAP Cloud Identity Services for the first application might require additional effort, it significantly reduces the workload for subsequent applications, as there will be no need to populate additional application-specific user stores."

- CIO Guide: Identity Lifecycle in SAP Landscapes (2024)

entry.title: Re: PO payment term for freight condition separate from payment term in header
entry.content: Hello experts, we also have the same situation. Something has been released/created since this post (2010), considering that there are a lot of tools for character recognition systems.

entry.title: Re: Customization of Item Enrollment Email template for a...
entry.content: @mayuriseth, as far as I understood the scenario, "will that trigger email automatically each time after the item is assigned to the user (like the global template works)" - yes, this is what should happen. The email trigger remains the same, just the email template (KBA 2274848) will come from a different place, as that was modified at the item level, in this case.

entry.title: ECC INTRA-company stock transfer between different Company Codes.
entry.content:
Greetings -

Client requirement (due to NON-DEBATABLE/NEGOTIABLE Finance requirement) is to "cheat" standard SAP ECC STO process/functionality to transfer stock between two company codes as INTRA-company STO.

For example:

Plant=3100 in CC=3010 transfers stock to Plant=3900 in CC=3000.

Enhance/customize SAP ECC to "think" CC=3010 and CC=3000 are the same.

Has anyone designed/solutioned the above "special" business scenario as INTRA-company between different Company Codes?

Of course, no billing/invoice should be generated.

Client doesn't care if the solution is standard (obviously can NOT) or customized.

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: SF LMS Reporting Item Workflow attributes - Approval/...
entry.content: @raviP, if you're talking about the database tables to be queried, you could try the "PA_TAP..." tables (KBA 2326249).

entry.title: Re: Insert ROW-TYPE variable into table without explicitly typing all column names
entry.content: Hi, have you checked if the statement wise trigger fits your needs? (see https://help.sap.com/docs/HANA_SERVICE_CF/7c78579ce9b14a669c1f3295b0d8ca16/20d5a65575191014946db96aaedbef5b.html)

entry.title: Re: In LMS the external ID is not matched with SF platfor...
entry.content: @chandrayee_sengupta_2023, "image-1" shows that the user ID (below the person's name) and the external ID match in Learning. The username is the one that differs, containing an additional zero. Isn't the username something that can be modified in BizX/Platform (KBA 2457516)?

entry.title: Process design and standardization for SAP Digital Supply Chain Cloud Solutions in SAP Signavio
entry.content:
Introduction

When starting with an implementation project for your digital core of SAP S/4HANA, there is best practice content at your disposal for various Line of Business scope items, each containing accelerators for your project in the form of process flows, test scripts, etc.

For our cloud based Digital Supply Chain solutions that same level of detail is not available as a best practice offering, but we are looking to bridge that gap with standardized process content in the form of a Value Accelerator Library package that is available within SAP Signavio.

This content can then be used as a baseline when executing Fit-to-Standard workshops during the Explore phase of a project.  The provided process flows can be used as a starting point and then enhanced with additional steps in Signavio based on the user stories applicable for each customer.

This VAL package includes content for the following SAP Digital Supply Chain solutions:

  • SAP Product Lifecycle Management
  • SAP Digital Manufacturing
  • SAP Asset Performance Management
  • SAP Field Service Management.

By using the SAP Reference Business Architecture as the framework, we can assign the business processes that are executed in each of the Digital Supply Chain solutions to the appropriate Business Process Model in the RBA.

 

How to install the VAL package

Note:  your user must have Administrator access to the Signavio workspace in order to install the content.

  • Starting from the Process Collaboration Hub after signing in to Signavio, go to the Value Accelerator Library to search for the DSC package.

 

  • Search for the appropriate package using the filter criteria available.  For example, in the case of the DSC content, you can search for SAP as the publisher, SAP Signavio Process Manager as the content, and Plan to Fulfill (P2P) as the Process.

 

  • Once the package is opened, click on the Install button on the top right corner to start the installation of the VAL package.

 

  • When prompted for the target workspace where the content will be installed, select the appropriate workspace.  If you do not have the Administrator role and are not able to install the content to this workspace, you will be notified at this point.

 

  • Continue with the remaining prompts to start the installation.  Once the installation is started, you will see the status of the installation displayed and can check with the installation has been completed.

 

  • Once it has been completed, the content will not be available in the Shared Documents folder.

 

 

How to use and modify the content during projects

Once the content has been installed in the Shared Folders, the process flow diagrams can be modified in the Signavio editor to tailor the processes to the customer requirements.

entry.title: Re: Cloud ALM Landscape Management Import not executing
entry.content:
Hi,  2023_kurt ,

The Import of systems occurs in Cloud ALM > Administration > Landscape Management.  You can click Configuration cog and from there, check Status of Imports:


You can manually trigger the job by clicking Import My Subscribed SAP Services (bottom link in above screen).  In case you need further help getting it to run successfully, you should log a support case for this.

Best regards,
Paula

entry.title: Re: SuccessFactors LMS
entry.content: @Veronika_Gutierrez, as far as I understand, the update to have the assignment type from filled out to blank would need to happen one by one for existing courses. For new courses, this field can be reviewed before running the Item Connector, if this is being used to create courses (Course (Item) Data Connector File Columns).

entry.title: Sales Order block for dangerous materials
entry.content:
Hello, 

My client's business include some dangerous materials and need to apply 2 level controls on sales orders: 

1. First control level : blocking sales order if the ship-to-party is out of validity according to a license at the sales order date.

2. Second control level: information pop-up at sales order when quantity or weight limit is reached for a group of materials by:

 2.1. One sales order/Delivery

2.2. Sales order during a define period

My question is: which SAP business process could handle this process? Can it handle full process or at least first control level

entry.title: Re: BAPI to Update warranty details in IE02 using ABAP Codes
entry.content:
Hey Dominik, I just implemented your suggestion. I was not able to create/update warranty dates this way.

I was able to modify other fields of "cs_object" in the BAdI but not GWLDT and GWLEN. There also seems to be no field for warranty type (GAART - vendor/customer warranty) so maybe that's a dead end.

I ended up using function module WARRANTY_ASSIGNMENT_RFC which inserts/updates warranty information for a given key. But since this isn't a BAPI I would be more than happy to know if someone successfully used your approach and what I did wrong in my implementation:

DATA extension TYPE bapiparex.

DATA(warranty) = VALUE bapi_bgmkobj( war_date = '20251001'
                                     warranty = '20271001' ).

cl_abap_container_utilities=>fill_container_c( EXPORTING  im_value               = warranty
                                               IMPORTING  ex_container           = extension+30(960)
                                               EXCEPTIONS illegal_parameter_type = 1
                                                          OTHERS                 = 2 ).

DATA(extensions) = VALUE bapiparextab( (  extension ) ).
DATA(return) = VALUE bapiret2( ).

CALL FUNCTION 'BAPI_EQUI_CHANGE'
  EXPORTING equipment      = '000000000010000001'
            data_general   = VALUE bapi_itob( )
            data_generalx  = VALUE bapi_itobx( )
            data_specific  = VALUE bapi_itob_eq_only( )
            data_specificx = VALUE bapi_itob_eq_onlyx( )
  IMPORTING return         = return
  TABLES    extensionin    = extensions.

 

  METHOD if_ex_badi_eam_itob_cust_field~extensionin_equi_change.
    DATA warranty TYPE bapi_bgmkobj.

    DATA(extension) = it_extensionin[ 1 ].

    cl_abap_container_utilities=>read_container_c( EXPORTING  im_container           = extension+30(960)
                                                   IMPORTING  ex_value               = warranty
                                                   EXCEPTIONS illegal_parameter_type = 1
                                                              OTHERS                 = 2 ).

    cs_object-gwldt = warranty-war_date.
    cs_object-gwlen = warranty-warranty.
  ENDMETHOD.

entry.title: Change TREX UI port.
entry.content:
When we launch transaction ESH_COCKPIT, by default the URL is going to port 8000.

How do we change to 8443?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Change TREX UI port.
entry.content:
Hello,

The HTTPURLLOC table should be maintained accordingly at the affected SID and client with the desired application (e.g. /webdynpro/sap/esh_admin_ui_component, in this case), hostname and port.

Refer to KBA 3288477.

 

Best regards.

entry.title: Re: BI2025: Side-by-Side Migration vs. In-Place Update.
entry.content:
Are there really so many fundamental changes to the basic programming compared to 4.3 that a side-by-side is so strongly recommended ?
Yes, there are a lot of new widgets and functions, but compared to the massive changes when moving to 64bit, HTML5, DataMode with 4.3, the problems should be more on the usual/typical scale as with the update of every ‘normal’ SAP service pack 🙄😉
A clean new system is of course always the best solution, but not absolutely necessary.

entry.title: SAP Report Build to List Reversing Journals
entry.content:
Hello,
We need to build a live SAP report that list all reversing journals posted in a financial year for our auditors. Can you please advise if such a report already exists and, if so, where it can be accessed in the system? If it doesn't exist can you advise the best way to construct it to include this information?
Thanks,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Report Build to List Reversing Journals
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

You can use the "Journal" report, this report to record all journal entries in chronological order by document number, document type, and posting date. For each journal entry, the individual line items are also displayed with the accounts to which the entry was posted and the respective amount. You can use this report to check, for example, whether the document numbers have been issued without gaps.

Also, you can add Fields and filter for Reversal Journal entries. For more details, please refer to the Help Documentation below:
Journal
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/2c27d254722d1014a865c5ccfe5f1713.html?locale=en-US
2559087 - How-To and Consulting Queries in Reporting for Analytics https://me.sap.com/notes/2559087

please is there a way to edit new hires records by import?

entry.title: Re: Introduction to SAP DRC and Integration aspects
entry.content:
Hi Rashed,

yes, AIF is needed. However, the DRC licenses include a DRC only version of AIF. The full AIF license is not needed unless you want to develop your own country versions in the DRC Framework.

Please reach out to your SAP Account Executive for the details.

Best regards,

Martin

entry.title: Re: edoc: Status of the eDocument does not allow the execution of process step
entry.content: Hi Marco, I assume you have the appropriate DRC licenses needed?

entry.title: O que esperar no SAP Inside Track Salvador? #SITSAL2025
entry.content:
No dia 26 de abril de 2025, Salvador se tornará o epicentro do conhecimento SAP com a realização do SAP Inside Track Salvador, um dos eventos mais aguardados pela Comunidade SAP no Brasil. Parte de uma série global organizada por membros ativos da comunidade, o SAP Inside Track tem como missão compartilhar experiências reais, fortalecer o networking e explorar o que há de mais atual nas soluções SAP

Nesta edição, o destaque será total para as inovações do SAP S/4HANA, IA generativa, APIs bancárias, Tax as a Service, Clean Core e muito mais.

O que está por vir na programação?

 

O evento conta com um time de peso composto por especialistas reconhecidos, trazendo temas técnicos, funcionais e estratégicos:

Marssel Vilaça — abre o evento com a Keynote de boas-vindas, conectando tendências, propósito e a importância do compartilhamento de conhecimento no crescimento da comunidade.

Fábio Dezan — com o tema "TaaS S/4HANA – Tax as a Service substituindo a TAXBRA e RVABRA", aborda a transformação nos processos fiscais com a chegada do S/4HANA.

Aline Damasceno — destaca “O futuro da logística operacional com SAP S/4HANA”, com foco em eficiência, visibilidade e mão de obra qualificada — pilares cruciais para a evolução logística.

Manuel Robalinho — apresenta “A inovação dos processos financeiros com APIs bancárias”, essencial para quem busca automação financeira e integração com o sistema bancário.

Eliana Lanna — compartilha lições práticas do projeto Evolution, com foco na implantação do S/4HANA na PetroRecôncavo, trazendo os bastidores de um projeto real.

Luciano Casado — conecta tecnologia e propósito com o tema "Joule: a nova experiência da SAP e por que você deveria dar match com ela".

Iliada Campos — com o tema “Deve é bom, mas conhecer o SAP ajuda a trazer grandes resultados”, mostra como o conhecimento funcional transforma a jornada profissional.

Lucas Ferreira — explora personalizações Clean Core com SAP Fiori, orientando como customizar sem comprometer a integridade do sistema.

Alexandre Guerreiro — encerra com o poderoso tema “SAP Accelerate: como a Accenture vem aplicando IA Generativa em soluções SAP”, apontando o futuro das soluções empresariais inteligentes.

Por que participar?

O SAP Inside Track Salvador 2025 é o lugar certo para quem busca:

  • Atualização profissional com conteúdo de ponta

  • Networking com especialistas, líderes e novos talentos

  • Conhecimento aplicado, direto de projetos reais

  • Inspiração para alavancar sua carreira com SAP

O evento será realizado na Sala Taperapuã, Porto Bello Hotéis, Salvador/BA.

O Evento conta com capacidade esgotada - Ficou de fora? Siga este grupo da Comunidade Salvador e fique sempre por dentro das proximas edições
www.sitBrazil.com

 

Organização e apoio

O evento é organizado por voluntários da Comunidade SAP e conta com o apoio de patrocinadores como SAP Press, Accenture, MakeValue, Tachyonix, GFX Consultoria e Moovi Education.

entry.title: Re: SAP GRC EAM - Email notification is not getting sent...
entry.content:
Hello @Renante,

 

Could you please confirm that you are not receiving reminders, not real notifications from ARM process?

If yes, please check whether you have:

  • proper configuration for reminders is done on MSMP level for ARM module
  • scheduled reminder job (GRFNMW_BATCH_EMAIL_REMINDER) is up and running - please find more in SAP Note 2501859 - GRFNMW_BATCH_EMAIL_REMINDER explained for additional details

 

Regards,

Lukasz

entry.title: Re: An error has occurred system message in GRC NWBC portal links
entry.content: Hi Lindag, Could you please share a screenshot of your issue?

entry.title: Re: EDIT HIRE RECORD BY IMPORT
entry.content: Dear Customer, Thank you for reaching out. I am Hannah from the Employee Central Team. I wanted to let you know that it is possible to edit new hire records using the "Import Employee Data" tool. I have included some official material for your reference: 1.Handbook: Managing Mass Changes in Employee Central >> Employee Data Import Process https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-employee-central/managing-mass-changes-in-employee-central/employee-data-import-process 2.2317955 - How to Correct or Remove Job Information Via Import in Full Purge Mode - EC https://me.sap.com/notes/2317955/E 3. 2080146 - What is the Correct Import Order When Creating Users? - Employee Central https://me.sap.com/notes/2080146/E Best regards, Hannah

entry.title: Inquiry On Public Support for Hedge Accounting Transactions
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,


I would like to understand whether the public cloud supports the following financial transactions, and what the relevant scope items are for the same:


1. Hedge Accounting for FX Forward - Group Ledger IFRS


2. Hedge Accounting for FX Swap - Group Ledger IFRS


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Inquiry On Public Support for Hedge Accounting Transa...
entry.content:
1XD    Hedge Accounting for FX Forward - Group Ledger IFRS

2UF    Hedge Accounting for FX Swap - Group Ledger IFRS

entry.title: Re: Error message when trying to create 2 new users
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for reaching out. I am Hannah from the Employee Central Team. Could you please check the following data/configuration:

1. If manager has a job information hire record;

2. Go to "Position Management Settings" >> "Hierarchy Adaptation" tab >> if "Threshold for Running Adoption of Reporting Line and Job Relationships as a Job" is between 5 ~ 20;

3. Go to "Manage Business Configuration" >> jobInfo >> manager-id field, details >> if visibility = Edit

 

If the manager has a job information hire record, and "Threshold for Running Adoption of Reporting Line and Job Relationships as a Job" is between 5 ~ 20, and visibility of manager-id field = Edit, but error still reports after import, please consider raising an incident to the LOD-SF-EC team via SAP For Me. Our Employee Central colleagues will be able to assist you and provide possible workarounds.

 

Best regards,

Hannah

entry.title: Re: About scope items for material closing period(MMPV)
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support Team,

Thank you for your response.

However, upon reviewing the 3F0 test script, we were unable to locate any test scenarios related to the Material Closing Period (MMPV).
We had been informed that the Material Closing Period previously included in BEI would be transferred to 3F0.
Yet, the current test scripts do not seem to reflect this functionality.
Could you please clarify the following points:
Details on the functionality and test scenarios corresponding to the Material Closing Period within 3F0.
Any additional system configuration, customization, or important considerations required for the migration.

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Re: Error message when trying to create 2 new users
entry.content:
Hello,

Please have a look at KBA 3578653 - Future hired manager could not be searched under Job Information<Supervisor field

  • Only the users whose status is active in EP could be searched out and set under Job Information<Supervisor field.

So in your case, you could consider to fill the manager-id field as value "NO_MANAGER".

If your instance uses Position hierarchy as leading hierarchy in Position Management, then schedule a Position Management Daily Hierarchy Adaptation job to run daily. This job will change new hire's manager to the incumbent of parent position on the hire date.

Setting Up Automated Hierarchy Adaptation

 

Hope the answer helps.

entry.title: PO conditions payment terms
entry.content: Dear experts, we have a Optical Character Recognition System (VIM) by Open Text. Is there a way to use payment terms for Condition vendor instead the PO payment term?

entry.title: Re: Can we send an email update to Managers when the empl...
entry.content:
Hello,

Add manager in CC in the new hire workflow. After the workflow is approved, a notification will be sent to manager.

Hope the answer helps.

entry.title: Re: Payments for PO Condition
entry.content: Hello Garcia, is there a way to use diferent payment terms for the PO Vendor and for the Condition Vendor (e.g. freigth carrier)? Thanks in advance.

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Need API to Fetch Customer Hierarchies in S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Added Master Data tag and removed other tags.

Suggest you read below Blog for tips of getting your answers faster:

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to set initial values at go-live on en...
entry.content:
Hello,

According to KBA 3063678 - Entry Date Field Logic via Centralized Services

  • These fields are system calculated when Job Classification, Position, Company, Location, Department or Pay Scale Level are changed as detailed in the following handbook page:
    SAP SuccessFactors Data Model Reference Guide: Entry Dates and TimeIn Calculation for Job Information

which means the standard fields of the entry-date are set automatically by the system once the relevant fields are changed. That is to say, the entry-date fields could not be changed if the relevant fields are not changed.

If your business need requires an Entry Date field, whose calculation deviates from the system logic, a custom date field can be used for this purpose. You can follow the steps provided in KBA 3063678 - Entry Date Field Logic via Centralized Services

 

Hope the answer helps.

entry.title: Re: Posting attachment to Item Level via API
entry.content:
Added Procure tag and removed other tags.

Suggest you read below Blog for tips of getting your answers faster:

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: I want to create custom CDS view of custom fields?
entry.content:
Dear All,
 
I want to know about custom fields and custom CDS view.
①Then create custom fields, is custom CDS view of that custom fields created automatically?
For example, then I create custom fields that is included ID and text, custom CDS view of that custom fields（ID and text) is created automatically.

②If ① is not correct, how to create custom CDS view of that custom fields?
For example,
■custom field that created
・branch
101 JAPAN
102 USA
103 GERMANY
■custom CDS view that I want to create
item :
ID    TEXT
101 JAPAN
102 USA
103 GERMANY
 
Best Regards.
Labels:

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA Public cloud 的開窗可以隱藏不需要的公司代碼嗎?
entry.content: 应该是没有这种功能。

entry.title: How to use Value Help View to create Custom CDS View.
entry.content:
Dear All,

Then I create Custom Fields by Code List, Value Help View is created automatically.

(YY1_JGCODE_V)

 

I want to use this CDS View to create Custom CDS View.

But, this CDS View isn't displayed as Primary Data Source when create Custom CDS View.

How to use this CDS View(YY1_JGCODE_V) to create Custom CDS View?

I think the reason, that this CDS View isn't displayed as Primary Data Source, is that Cloud Dev. Rel. State is Not Released.

But I think Cloud Dev. Rel. State can't change Not Released. to Released.

Purpose is that I want to do I/F the data of YY1_JGCODE_V to other system.

Please tell me what we need to do to achieve this.

 

Best Regards,

Yuki Tsumura

entry.title: Can't find the role「SAP_SDF_ALM_METRIC_PUSH_HEALTH」in S/4HANA with ST-PI 740 SP18
entry.content:
We need to monitor the RISE S/4HANA system with SAP Cloud ALM.
The system has ST-PI 740 SP18 installed, but the role 「SAP_SDF_ALM_METRIC_PUSH_HEALTH」does not exist on the system.
How to get the roles for SAP Cloud ALM Operation monitoring?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Can't find the role「SAP_SDF_ALM_METRIC_PUSH_HEALTH」in...
entry.content:
• The Roles for metric push to SAP Cloud ALM can be found and downloaded from the note:
    3372078 - Update of ST-PI 7.40 delivered PFCG roles, relevant for the metric push to SAP Cloud ALM

  • As technical prerequisites for the monitoring of the ABAP systems, it is recommended to update the ST-PI to the latest the latest or second latest Support Package.
    Please review the expert portal guide: SAP S/4HANA and SAP Business Suite 7

entry.title: Different VAT number when PO raised to vendor in other country
entry.content:
I have company code in UK with one VAT number and the same company code have different VAT number in Austria. When I raise PO to vendor in Austria, I want Austrian VAT number of company code to be displayed in the print in place of source country VAT number. How can I get this achieved.

Regards

Venkatesh

entry.title: Re: SAP Certification for Partners: An Overview of the Latest Changes - Including Q&A
entry.content:
Thank you @Vitaly_Toraman for the suggestions. Unfortunately I am not seeing the option "access SAP learning rooms". On screenshare, last weekend, the SAP Helpdesk Support was trying to guide through same but couldn't proceed beyond. 

Hi cdabrowski, Thank you attending to my comment. I already have Case with them (Case ID : 5000123926). I was told "In checking your account I do not see the access available to you. For this you will need to reach out to the SAP Store team directly via the link below: (SAP store link was provide). If you wish to subscribe to SAP Certification Hub 1 or 6 exam attempts see here under Become certified".

That didn't help. From the quoted excerpt above and my interaction so far, it appears to me that the 2 attempts subscription is relatively new/ non-regular and hence not that recognized within the Helpdesks even. I can only guess though. Most likely I will be buying the 6 attempts subscription now. But as of now, issue remains far from resolved.

Thank you.

entry.title: ABAP Cloud Project in Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello experts,

We have a BTP account and have several sub accounts in it which do not have ABAP instance setup in them.

Can we still add these sub accounts to the ABAP eclipse or we need to create an ABAP instance for them first ?

We would like to debug our app when we run it in these sub accounts by setting them up in the eclipse.

Appreciate your inputs.

entry.content:
Best Web Design Company in Delhi – Professional Website Development Services by Dadhich Technologies

 

 

Are you looking for the best web design company in Delhi to create a stunning, fast, and SEO-friendly website for your business? Look no further!

 

In today’s digital world, having a professional website is not a luxury — it’s a necessity. Whether you are a startup, small business, or a large company, a well-designed website helps you build your online presence, generate leads, and grow your business.

 

Dadhich Technologies is the best web development company in Delhi, providing affordable and customized website design and development services for all types of businesses.

 

 

 

 

Why Choose Dadhich Technologies as Your Web Design Partner?

 

 

We are a trusted web design company in Delhi known for delivering high-quality websites that drive results. Our experienced team of website developers, designers, and digital marketing experts work together to bring your vision to life.

 

 

What Makes Us The Best Website Development Company in Delhi?

 

 

  • Customized Website Design
  • SEO Friendly Websites
  • Fast Loading Speed
  • Mobile Responsive Design
  • Affordable Packages
  • Free Consultation
  • 100% Client Satisfaction

 

 

 

 

 

Our Web Design & Development Services in Delhi

 

 

 

1. Website Design Services in Delhi

 

 

We create modern and creative website designs that reflect your brand identity. Our design approach is user-friendly, clean, and conversion-focused.

 

 

2. Website Development Company in Delhi

3. E-commerce Website Development Delhi

4. WordPress Developer in Delhi

 

 

Looking for a WordPress website developer in Delhi? We are experts in creating fast, SEO-optimized WordPress websites at an affordable price.

 

 

5. Shopify Developer in Delhi

 

 

Start your online store with the help of the best Shopify developers in Delhi. From theme customization to payment setup — we handle it all.

 

 

 

 

Benefits of Hiring a Professional Web Design Company in Delhi

 

 

  1. Save Time & Money
  2. Get a Mobile-Friendly Website
  3. Improve Website Security
  4. SEO Optimized Design for Ranking
  5. Better User Experience for Visitors
  6. Support & Maintenance

 

 

 

 

 

Who Can Hire Us?

 

 

We work with:

 

  • Startups & Entrepreneurs

Why Businesses Trust Dadhich Technologies?

 

 

At Dadhich Technologies, we don’t just build websites — we build your brand’s online identity.

 

We have already delivered successful projects for multiple clients across India and globally. Our focus is always on customer satisfaction, timely delivery, and building long-term relationships.

entry.title: 批量打印生产订单
entry.content:
求助SAP专家：

是否可以实现根据某一条件进行生产工单的筛选，例如某个时间段，或者某些单号。从众多的生产工单中选择出来，然后一次性批量打印？
目前APP Production Order Display ，只能查看一个生产订单去打印；或者APP Manage production orders 可以展示很多生产工单，但也不能做到挑选出需要的工单然后一次性全部打印。
是否有APP或者替代方案可以做到类似于Account document output 这个APP可以批量去打印财务凭证一样去批量打印生产工单？

或者是需要如何设置呢  谢谢

entry.title: FB60 Vendor posting for witholding tax
entry.content:
Hi All.

I have query on when in FB60 Vendor posting for witholding tax.

The amout is 10k, 8% of withholding tax at 800.

My current SAP settings is

Credit Vendor account 9200
Debit COGS account 10k
Credit Tax payable GL 800

Now user expectation is

Expecting entry -

Cr Vendor 10k
Cr Tax payable 800
DR GR/IR 10k
DR Vendor 800

Can please advise on the system setting/configuration?

Thanks

Suggest you read below Blog for tips of getting your answers faster:

Q&A for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - How to ... - SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Drop down field Manage Configuration UI
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for reaching out. This is Hannah from Employee Central Team. Regarding your query - How to create drop down field with answers no/yes in the Manage Configuration UI:

It is possible to create drop down field with picklist no/yes by following steps:

1. go to "Configure object definition" >> find the object, add custom field, make sure that:

data type = picklist, Valid Values Source = Picklist id (which is configured in Picklist Center)

and save.

2. go to "Manage configuration UI" >> find the UI, add field, make sure that:

value type = resolver, Value Type Resolver = custom field （which is configured in step 1）

and save.

 

Please refer to Screenshot 1.png

 

Best regards,

Hannah

entry.title: Re: Drop down field Manage Configuration UI
entry.content: Here is the screenshot

entry.title: Re: 交易幣別與功能幣別的匯率只能預設抓取IMG的設定，是否有方法讓USER自行調整匯率?

entry.title: Re: Can Output Management be used for custom forms?

entry.title: Introducing the New PaPM Step in Multi Actions in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Integrating SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) with SAP Profitability and Performance Management (PaPM) offers significant business value by combining powerful data visualization and planning capabilities with advanced profitability and allocation calculations. 

SAC users can execute PaPM calculations via API step within Multi actions today. API step in Multi Actions empowers SAC users to execute remote calculation or program as one step in a multi action sequence. It requires technical background to properly configure the API step.

I am excited to introduce the upcoming release of integrating PaPM step within multi actions, which will be available with our 2025 QRC2 release!  This new capability offers easy-to-use configurations, which empowers a non-IT user to create the streamlined workflows and improve efficiency.

What’s more, in the 2025 QRC2 release, SAC is introducing enhanced parameterizations for String type parameter and Datetime type parameter.

 

The PaPM Step in Multi Actions

A new dedicated step type in multi actions for PaPM integration

The PaPM integration step is now in a more prominent place in multi actions, making it more accessible for users.

 

 

Easy-to-use PaPM step configuration

Adding a PaPM step to your multi action is a straightforward process. As a user, your knowledge about the PaPM process is sufficient to easily configure the PaPM step in multi actions. You don’t need to bother about the complexity of the technical details of the HTTP APIs.

Here are the key steps involved:

  1. Enter a Name: Provide a name for the step to easily identify it within your multi action.
  2. Choose PaPM Connection: Select the appropriate PaPM connection to link your SAC tenant with PaPM system.  Note that the HTTP API connection created for the API step is not applicable in this context.
  3. Select Action: Decide whether you want to use an existing process or create a new one.
  4. Configure Activity: Depending on your choice of action, select the relevant PaPM environment, process, template, and activity.
  5. Set Parameters: Define the parameters for the PaPM step. You can choose pre-defined multi actions parameters or set fixed values.
  6. Choose Selections: Specify the selections for the PaPM step to tailor it to your needs. You can choose pre-defined multi actions parameters or set fixed values.
  7. Follow-Up Options: Decide if you want to delete the PaPM process after it runs or set the activity to complete if successful.

Once the PaPM integration step is added to the multi action, you can continue to add more steps, and reorder steps as required. This flexibility allows you to create comprehensive workflows that leverage the full capabilities of SAP Analytics Cloud and PaPM.

 

Enhanced parameterization strengthens the integration with PaPM

The current Member type parameter and Number type parameter are applicable to the new PaPM step. These parameters can be used across all existing steps and the new PaPM step.  

Additionally, the QRC2 2025 release introduces a new String type parameter and a new Datetime type parameter. These new parameters can be used in the PaPM step and the API step.

The String type parameter offers various options to easily choose the right values during multi actions execution.

  • The available values of the String type parameter can be bound with a PaPM parameter ensuring only the values allowed by the PaPM parameter can be chosen during multi actions execution.

  • The available values of the String type parameter can be predefined in the multi actions (for example, yes or no, true or false).

  • The available values of the String type parameter can also be a free string, allowing the full flexibility of any string during multi actions execution.

 

The Datetime type parameter is also introduced, providing a date picker and datetime picker for value selection. The date and datetime picker ensure accurate and efficient input, improving user experience and interaction with the product.

 

 

Execute Multi Action
This multi action can be executed in story, analytics application, and scheduled via Calendar as normal multi action.

Now, planner can execute this multi action via one button / schedule job simply. The complexity of planning process is hidden from end-user.

 

Example Use Case

Imagine a scenario where a company wants to analyze its profitability across different product lines and regions. By integrating PaPM step within a multi action in SAP Analytics Cloud, the company can automate the process of running profitability calculations in PaPM, gathering the calculation from PaPM to SAC and running further calculations in SAC.

Here's how the multi action works:

  1. Profitability Calculation: The PaPM step is triggered to run profitability calculations based on the collected data. This step leverages the Data Export Service and PaPM's advanced algorithms to pull data from SAC to PaPM and perform detailed calculations.
  2. Data Collection: Once the calculations are complete, the multi action proceeds to import the calculated profitability data via Data Import step.
  3. Data aggregation and consolidation: the profitability across different product lines and regions are aggregated and consolidated via the Data Action step.

By automating these steps within a multi action, the company can save time, reduce errors, and ensure that profitability analysis is conducted efficiently and effectively.

 

Conclusion

The integration of PaPM steps within multi actions in SAP Analytics Cloud marks a significant advancement in simplifying and streamlining the workflow. This new feature not only enhances the efficiency and accuracy of workflows but also provides users with the flexibility to tailor processes to their specific needs.

As businesses continue to navigate the complexities of the modern market, tools like these will be invaluable in driving success and growth

entry.title: Re: Exchange Rate Difference Line with Zero Amount Preven...
entry.content: Dear Jeremy, Thank you for your reply. We find that a group currency amount difference of 0.01 USD is generated between the down payment and accounts payable. However, all of our current transactions are conducted in TWD. Whether this exchange difference is intentionally retained by the system when the invoice is cleared with a down payment, or is it caused by exchange rate rounding differences due to multiple line items being calculated separately instead of based on the total amount (i.e., could this issue occur in scenarios beyond just down payments)? I've uploaded the screenshots in the article, thank you.

I see API call is one if option for transit time, but do we need to write separate logic to call GIS service or existing standard HSS call for DDD can be leveraged? We want to get the transit time from GIS since business will not be using Default routes and lanes will be very generic (Zone to Zone). Kindly share your thoughts.

Regards,

Karthik

entry.title: Re: Unable to subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation
entry.content: Does anyone know a solution to this issue?

entry.title: How to call BuildProcessAutomation's TriggerAPI from RAP
entry.content:
I'm trying to call the BuildProcessAutomation TriggerAPI from RAP, but it's not working.
Could you please tell me how to solve this problem or give me some sample code?

The call was successful when using the Development in Classic ABAP method, but when I coded in the determination on Save section, an error occurred at runtime.
I would like to use the Development in ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model (RAP) method.

See below

Development in ABAP RESTful Application Programming Model (RAP) | SAP Help Portal

 

Test Code(on determination on Save section)

CONSTANTS: wf_definitionId   TYPE if_swf_cpwf_api=>cpwf_def_id_long  VALUE 'us10.bdg1-customer-g1vd58ff.testonefield.test_one_field',
           wf_retention_days TYPE if_swf_cpwf_api=>retention_time VALUE '30',
           consumer          TYPE string VALUE 'DEFAULT'.

**** Define the structure of the payload
 types:begin of context,
   field1 type string,
 end of context.

  TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_context,
    context TYPE context,
  END OF ty_context.

 TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_payload,
   start_event TYPE ty_context,
 END OF ty_payload  .

TRY.
* Get the API of workflow
  DATA Wf_handle     TYPE sysuuid_c32.
  DATA(lo_cpwf_api) = cl_swf_cpwf_api_factory_a4c=>get_api_instance( ).

**convert workflow data to be passed in json format
  data lv_context type ty_context.
  lv_context-context-field1 = 'test_value'.

  DATA(context_json) = lo_cpwf_api->get_start_context_from_data(
        iv_capital_letter  = abap_false
*        it_name_mapping    = VALUE #( ( abap = 'CONTEXT' json = 'CONTEXT' ) )
        iv_data = lv_context
        ).


*trigger workflow
  MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_cpwf_inst
      ENTITY CPWFInstance
      EXECUTE registerWorkflow
      FROM VALUE #( (
*                      %key = '<a UUID which is mandatory for mass enabled callers>'
                      %param-RetentionTime = 30
                      %param-PaWfDefId = wf_definitionId
*                      %param-CpWfDefId = ''
*                      %param-CallbackClass = '<Callback class for final state handling>'
                      %param-Consumer = 'DEFAULT'
                    ) )
     MAPPED DATA(mapped_wf)
     FAILED DATA(failed_wf)
     REPORTED DATA(reported_wf).

  MODIFY ENTITIES OF i_cpwf_inst
      ENTITY CPWFInstance
      EXECUTE setPayload
      FROM VALUE #( (
*                      %key-CpWfHandle = '<required key (UUID) of the CPWF instance>'
                      %key-CpWfHandle = mapped_wf-cpwfinstance[ 1 ]-CpWfHandle
                      %param-context =  context_json ) )
      MAPPED mapped_wf
      FAILED failed_wf
      REPORTED reported_wf.

Dear team,

we need to customize the GSTR3B Standard Report for - India Compliance and want to add some fields in the report, which are available in the transaction.

9686669350

entry.title: Unexpected Credit Check Error During PGI Without an assigned Credit Segment
entry.content:
Hello Experts , 

We are experiencing an issue with the credit management setup in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud. If the Credit Segment is not maintained for the respective Sales Area, why does the system still throw a credit-related error during Post Goods Issue (PGI)?


According to the standard O2C/OTC process behavior, the absence of an assigned Credit Segment for a specific Sales Area typically indicates that credit management should not be active for that combination.

As a result, the system should not perform a credit check, and no credit-related error should occur.
However, in our current scenario, the system unexpectedly triggers a credit error during PGI, even though no Credit Segment is maintained for the Sales Area in question.

This behavior seems contrary to standard functionality, and we are trying to understand why the system enforces a credit check under these circumstances.


Is this an expected behavior under certain configurations or conditions, or could this indicate a misconfiguration? Any insights or suggestions for troubleshooting would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: odp_prefetch/error 000001 '00010101' is not a valid v...
entry.content:
what steps have you taken to solve this error by yourself?

00010101 is obviously a problem with a wrong date

Regards,

Mitesh
